implementation_summary: Checked production reachability for the configured frontend, backend health endpoint, and public API account endpoint. Basic reachability passed for frontend and backend; unauthenticated public API returned the expected 401-style protection boundary.
tests_passed: Public API /v1/account returned HTTP 401 without an API key, confirming auth protection instead of an open endpoint.
known_limitations: This verifies reachability only; it does not prove that the latest local commit has been deployed.
H2 cannot be accepted as full release verification until H1 full E2E passes against the deployed target.
